title.en: The Trigger Frame and the Control Wrapper

blocks.en: In modern Wi-Fi the access point does not just take turns with stations — it conducts them like an orchestra. When the AP wants several stations to transmit uplink at the same instant, sharing the channel by splitting it into resource units (OFDMA) or by spatial streams (MU-MIMO), it sends a single Control frame that says: everyone named here, get ready, and transmit together a SIFS from now. That conductor's baton is the Trigger frame.
blocks.zh: 在现代 Wi-Fi 里，接入点（AP）不只是和各个站点轮流发言——它更像乐队指挥。当 AP 希望多个站点在同一时刻一起上行发送，通过把信道切分成资源单元（OFDMA）或按空间流（MU-MIMO）来共享频谱时，它会发出一帧控制帧，意思是：被点名的各位，准备好，从现在起一个 SIFS 之后一起发。这根“指挥棒”就是 Trigger 帧（触发帧）。

blocks.en: A Trigger frame allocates resources for, and solicits, one or more HE TB (trigger-based) PPDU transmissions, and carries everything the responders need to build that uplink. Its body splits cleanly into two parts: one Common Info field, whose settings apply to every responder (bandwidth, guard interval, the AP's own transmit power), and a User Info List — a sequence of per-station User Info fields, one telling each named station exactly which resource unit, coding, and modulation to use.
blocks.zh: Trigger 帧为一个或多个 HE TB（基于触发的）PPDU 传输分配资源并发起请求，并携带响应方构造该上行所需的全部信息。它的帧体清晰地分为两部分：一个 Common Info 字段，其设置对所有响应方一律适用（带宽、保护间隔、AP 自身的发射功率）；以及一个 User Info List（用户信息列表）——由若干个“每站点”的 User Info 字段组成，逐一告诉每个被点名的站点具体使用哪个资源单元、哪种编码与调制。

desc.en: Identifies this as a Trigger frame (a Control frame subtype).
desc.zh: 标识本帧为 Trigger 帧（控制帧的一个子类型）。

desc.en: Sets the NAV so other stations stay quiet through the solicited uplink.
desc.zh: 设置 NAV，使其他站点在被请求的上行期间保持静默。

desc.en: The single target STA's address, or the broadcast address when many STAs are addressed.
desc.zh: 单个目标站点的地址；当寻址多个站点时为广播地址。

desc.en: The transmitting AP's address (or transmitted BSSID across a multiple-BSSID set).
desc.zh: 发送方 AP 的地址（跨 Multiple-BSSID 集合时为 transmitted BSSID）。

desc.en: 8 octets or more. Applies to all responders: Trigger Type, UL Length, UL BW, GI/HE-LTF type, AP Tx Power, and more.
desc.zh: 8 字节或更多。对所有响应方适用：Trigger 类型、UL Length、UL BW、GI/HE-LTF 类型、AP 发射功率等。

name.zh: User Info List（用户信息列表）

desc.en: Variable length. Zero or more per-STA User Info fields: AID12, RU Allocation, FEC, MCS, target Rx power.
desc.zh: 可变长度。零个或多个“每站点”User Info 字段：AID12、RU 分配、FEC、MCS、目标接收功率。

desc.en: Variable, optional. Extends the frame so recipients have enough time to prepare their response; set to all 1s.
desc.zh: 可变、可选。延长帧长，使接收方有足够时间准备响应；全部置 1。

desc.en: Frame check sequence over the whole frame.
desc.zh: 对整帧计算的帧校验序列。

blocks.en: The Common Info field opens with a 4-bit Trigger Type that picks the variant. A Basic trigger asks for ordinary uplink data; others specialise: BFRP solicits beamforming reports, MU-BAR a block-ack, MU-RTS a protective CTS, BSRP a buffer-status report, BQRP a bandwidth query, NFRP an NDP feedback report, and Ranging drives FTM. After the type come the shared PPDU parameters — UL Length, UL BW (20/40/80/160 MHz), the GI and HE-LTF type, and the AP Tx Power subfield, where the AP advertises its own transmit power so each responder can set its uplink power by inverting the measured path loss.
blocks.zh: Common Info 字段以一个 4 比特的 Trigger Type 开头，用于选择变体。Basic 触发请求普通上行数据；其余各有专长：BFRP 索取波束成形报告，MU-BAR 请求块确认，MU-RTS 触发保护性的 CTS，BSRP 请求缓冲区状态报告，BQRP 发起带宽查询，NFRP 索取 NDP 反馈报告，Ranging 则驱动 FTM 测距。类型之后是共享的 PPDU 参数——UL Length、UL BW（20/40/80/160 MHz）、GI 与 HE-LTF 类型，以及 AP Tx Power 子字段：AP 在此公布自身的发射功率，每个响应方据此反推所测得的路径损耗，从而设定自己的上行功率。

blocks.en: Each User Info field then names one station and its slice of the air. It opens with AID12 — twelve bits of the association ID identifying the target. A value of 1 to 2007 addresses one associated STA; the special values 0 and 2045 instead allocate random-access RUs (for associated or unassociated STAs respectively), turning that RU into a contention slot for UORA. The RU Allocation subfield then pins down which resource unit (its size and position), and UL FEC Coding Type, UL HE-MCS, UL DCM, an SS Allocation, and a UL Target Receive Power subfield finish describing exactly how that station should transmit.
blocks.zh: 随后，每个 User Info 字段点名一个站点及其在空中的“那一片”。它以 AID12 开头——关联标识符 AID 的低 12 位，用于标识目标。取值 1 到 2007 寻址一个已关联站点；特殊值 0 与 2045 则改为分配随机接入 RU（分别面向已关联、未关联站点），把该 RU 变成 UORA 的竞争时隙。RU Allocation 子字段进一步锁定使用哪个资源单元（其大小与位置），而 UL FEC Coding Type、UL HE-MCS、UL DCM、SS Allocation 以及 UL Target Receive Power 子字段，则把该站点应如何发送描述得一清二楚。

blocks.en: Why does AID12 use 12 bits but stop at 2007 for a real STA? Because higher values are reserved as escape codes — 2046 marks an unallocated RU, and 4095 marks the start of the Padding field. The same field thus addresses a station, opens a random-access slot, or signals 'I'm done listing stations,' depending on the number you write in it.
blocks.zh: 为什么 AID12 用了 12 比特，真正的站点编号却止于 2007？因为更高的取值被保留为“转义码”——2046 表示一个未分配的 RU，4095 表示 Padding 字段的开始。于是同一个字段，依据你写入的数值不同，既可以寻址某个站点、开辟一个随机接入时隙，也可以发出“站点列举完毕”的信号。

blocks.en: Now a different puzzle. The Control frames — RTS, CTS, Ack, BlockAck — are deliberately tiny, with a fixed layout and no room for the HT Control field that carries link-adaptation and feedback signalling. So how do you attach an HT Control field to a frame that has no slot for one? You wrap it. The Control Wrapper frame is a thin envelope that carries any other Control frame together with an HT Control field, smuggling that extra control signalling onto a frame format that otherwise could never hold it.
blocks.zh: 现在来看另一个难题。各类控制帧——RTS、CTS、Ack、BlockAck——被刻意设计得极小，布局固定，根本没有空间容纳承载链路自适应与反馈信令的 HT Control 字段。那么，如何给一个本就没有此栏位的帧附上 HT Control 字段呢？把它包起来。Control Wrapper 帧（控制封装帧）就是一层轻薄的外壳，它把任意一个其他控制帧连同一个 HT Control 字段一起携带，从而把这份额外的控制信令“夹带”到一个原本绝无可能容纳它的帧格式之上。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 520 150' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='6' y='40' width='52' height='34'/><rect x='58' y='40' width='52' height='34'/><rect x='110' y='40' width='52' height='34'/><rect x='162' y='40' width='70' height='34'/><rect x='232' y='40' width='60' height='34'/><rect x='292' y='40' width='120' height='34' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><rect x='412' y='40' width='44' height='34'/></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle'><text x='32' y='61'>Frame</text><text x='84' y='61'>Dur/ID</text><text x='136' y='61'>Addr 1</text><text x='197' y='55'>Carried</text><text x='197' y='67'>Frm Ctrl</text><text x='262' y='55'>HT</text><text x='262' y='67'>Control</text><text x='352' y='61'>Carried Frame</text><text x='434' y='61'>FCS</text></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10'><text x='32' y='90'>2</text><text x='84' y='90'>2</text><text x='136' y='90'>6</text><text x='197' y='90'>2</text><text x='262' y='90'>4</text><text x='352' y='90'>variable</text><text x='434' y='90'>4</text></g><text x='262' y='118' fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10'>HT Control (9.2.4.6) is the whole point — the field the wrapped frame had no room for</text></svg>

caption.en: Control Wrapper frame format (Figure 9-65): a Carried Frame Control holds the wrapped frame's own Frame Control, the HT Control field rides in the middle, and the Carried Frame holds everything that followed Address 1 in the original (minus its FCS).
caption.zh: Control Wrapper 帧格式（图 9-65）：Carried Frame Control 存放被封装帧自身的 Frame Control，HT Control 字段居中搭载，Carried Frame 则存放原帧 Address 1 之后的全部内容（去掉其 FCS）。

summary.en: Field-exact reading of the two formats
summary.zh: 两种格式的逐字段精确解读

blocks.en: Trigger frame (9.3.1.22, Figure 9-90): Frame Control, Duration, RA, TA, then a Common Info field of 8 or more octets, a variable User Info List, an optional Padding field, and the FCS. The Common Info field (Figure 9-91) is a bit-packed structure: Trigger Type (4 bits), UL Length (12), More TF (1), CS Required (1), UL BW (2), GI And HE-LTF Type (2), MU-MIMO HE-LTF Mode (1), Number Of HE-LTF Symbols And Midamble Periodicity (3), UL STBC (1), LDPC Extra Symbol Segment (1), AP Tx Power (6), Pre-FEC Padding Factor (2), PE Disambiguity (1), UL Spatial Reuse (16), Doppler (1), UL HE-SIG-A2 Reserved (9), Reserved (1), and an optional Trigger Dependent Common Info. AP Tx Power encodes PTX = -20 + FVal dBm per 20 MHz (values above 60 reserved). Each User Info field (Figure 9-93) is AID12 (12 bits), RU Allocation (8), UL FEC Coding Type (1), UL HE-MCS (4), UL DCM (1), SS Allocation / RA-RU Information (6), UL Target Receive Power (7), Reserved (1), and an optional Trigger Dependent User Info. Control Wrapper frame (9.3.1.9, Figure 9-65): Frame Control (2 octets), Duration/ID (2), Address 1 (6), Carried Frame Control (2), HT Control (4, defined in 9.2.4.6), Carried Frame (variable), FCS (4). The Carried Frame Control holds the wrapped Control frame's Frame Control value, and the Carried Frame holds the fields that followed Address 1 in the wrapped frame, excluding its FCS — so the wrapper supplies the HT Control field the original could not carry.
blocks.zh: Trigger 帧（9.3.1.22，图 9-90）：Frame Control、Duration、RA、TA，随后是一个 8 字节或更长的 Common Info 字段、一个可变的 User Info List、可选的 Padding 字段以及 FCS。Common Info 字段（图 9-91）是按比特紧密打包的结构：Trigger Type（4 比特）、UL Length（12）、More TF（1）、CS Required（1）、UL BW（2）、GI And HE-LTF Type（2）、MU-MIMO HE-LTF Mode（1）、Number Of HE-LTF Symbols And Midamble Periodicity（3）、UL STBC（1）、LDPC Extra Symbol Segment（1）、AP Tx Power（6）、Pre-FEC Padding Factor（2）、PE Disambiguity（1）、UL Spatial Reuse（16）、Doppler（1）、UL HE-SIG-A2 Reserved（9）、Reserved（1），以及可选的 Trigger Dependent Common Info。AP Tx Power 的编码为 PTX = -20 + FVal dBm/20 MHz（大于 60 的取值保留）。每个 User Info 字段（图 9-93）为 AID12（12 比特）、RU Allocation（8）、UL FEC Coding Type（1）、UL HE-MCS（4）、UL DCM（1）、SS Allocation / RA-RU Information（6）、UL Target Receive Power（7）、Reserved（1），以及可选的 Trigger Dependent User Info。Control Wrapper 帧（9.3.1.9，图 9-65）：Frame Control（2 字节）、Duration/ID（2）、Address 1（6）、Carried Frame Control（2）、HT Control（4，定义于 9.2.4.6）、Carried Frame（可变）、FCS（4）。Carried Frame Control 存放被封装控制帧的 Frame Control 值，Carried Frame 存放被封装帧中 Address 1 之后的各字段（不含其 FCS）——于是外壳补上了原帧无法携带的 HT Control 字段。

cites.note: 9.3.1.9 Control Wrapper frame — Figure 9-65 layout; wraps any other Control frame with an HT Control field; Carried Frame Control and Carried Frame semantics

9.3.1.22 User Info field — Figure 9-93 layout; AID12 encoding Table 9-52; RU Allocation; UL HE-MCS/FEC; UL Target Receive Power; Padding
